inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: Athlete's body weight in kilograms, used to estimate energy expenditure.

inputs.label: Workout Duration
inputs.businessContext: Total duration of the CrossFit workout in minutes.

inputs.label: MET Value
inputs.businessContext: Metabolic Equivalent of Task (MET) for the workout intensity. CrossFit typically ranges 6-12 METs.

inputs.label: Gender Adjustment Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to adjust calories for gender differences (commonly 1.0 for males, 0.9 for females).
